scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/fix-shebang.mjs && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.check: tsgo --noEmit && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts init --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts collect --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts review --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts upload --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts reject --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts list --help >/dev/null && node --experimental-strip-types src/index.ts grep --help >/dev/null
